name: The Business Platinum Card® from American Express

earning_rates.category: Flights and Prepaid Hotels via Amex Travel
earning_rates.notes: 5X Membership Rewards points on flights and prepaid hotels booked through Amex Travel.
Rotating quarterly categories (up to $150,000 combined annual spend). In Q4 2025: U.S. shipping, wireless telephone services, advertising, and tech.

annual_credits.name: Amex Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $200 annual credit for incidental fees at one selected airline.

annual_credits.name: Dell Technologies Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $400 statement credit per year for U.S. Dell Technologies purchases (up to $200 through July 2025, increased to $400 after).

annual_credits.name: Hotel Collection Credit
annual_credits.description: $600 in statement credits when booking The Hotel Collection properties through Amex Travel.

annual_credits.name: American Express Global Lounge Collection
annual_credits.description: Complimentary access to Centurion Lounges, Delta Sky Clubs (when flying Delta), Priority Pass, and other lounges in the Amex Global Lounge Collection.

annual_credits.name: Walmart+ Membership Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $155.40 per year in Walmart+ credits (~$12.95/month).

lounge_access.other: Airspace, Escape, and other partner lounges

hotel_status: Hilton Honors Gold (when booking through Amex Travel)
Marriott Bonvoy Gold (when booking through Amex Travel)
other_benefits: 35% Airline Bonus: Use Pay With Points to get 35% of points back on flights booked through Amex Travel (up to 500,000 points per year)
Global Entry/TSA PreCheck statement credit ($120, up to $200 with renewal)
Secondary rental car coverage (when declining CDW)

recurring_credits.name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 annual credit for airline incidentals. Enrollment required.

recurring_credits.name: $100 Dell Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 quarterly ($400/year) for Dell purchases. Enrollment required.
